title: Don't buy anything from Huawei, DJI....

replies.msg:
If you really support Hong Kong, DO NOT GIVE MONEY TO THIS MURDER GOVERNMENT!!

These companies are partially owned by the Chinese government and provided financial support to this oppressive killer government!

Urge US companies to get back Riot from Tencent, or else don't spend a dime on League! Just play other games!

Buy other phones, don't get Huawei and Xiaomi!

Drones and gimbals are difficult, but if you are really want to stop people from being killed, don't. We know that there is a cost. Please don't.
罷買中國電子產品， 咁鬼危險
